requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs SAE J1772 / CCS1 for a 60 Hz Americas-Influenced Market
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与60 Hz美洲体系市场的SAE J1772 / CCS1
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與60 Hz美洲體系市場的SAE J1772 / CCS1

summary.en: A Liberia national EV connector mandate could not be confirmed from public official sources as of 2026-06-14. Because Liberia is an English-speaking, 60 Hz, 120/240 V market with US/Americo-Liberian electrical influence, the Americas connector ecosystem — SAE J1772 (Type 1) for AC and CCS1 for DC — is the plausible default for imported EV infrastructure and North American vehicles, but it must be confirmed in each procurement, donor, fleet, or LERC/LEC project specification. Type 2 / CCS2 should not be assumed merely because IEC 61851 is used for safety evidence. Connector choice becomes mandatory when written into the tender, vehicle fleet, charge-point operator, site-owner, donor, or utility acceptance requirement.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，未能从公开官方来源确认利比里亚全国EV接口强制规则。由于利比里亚是英语国家，采用60 Hz、120/240 V供电，并受美国/美裔利比里亚电气体系影响，美洲接口生态——交流SAE J1772（Type 1）和直流CCS1——对进口EV基础设施和北美车辆而言是合理默认推断，但必须在每个采购、捐助方、车队或LERC/LEC项目规范中确认。不能仅因采用IEC 61851安全证据就假定Type 2 / CCS2适用。当接口类型写入招标、车辆车队、充电点运营商、场地方、捐助方或公用事业验收要求时，即成为强制项目要求。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，未能從公開官方來源確認賴比瑞亞全國EV接口強制規則。由於賴比瑞亞是英語國家，採用60 Hz、120/240 V供電，並受美國/美裔賴比瑞亞電氣體系影響，美洲接口生態——交流SAE J1772（Type 1）和直流CCS1——對進口EV基礎設施和北美車輛而言是合理默認推斷，但必須在每個採購、捐助方、車隊或LERC/LEC項目規範中確認。不能僅因採用IEC 61851安全證據就假定Type 2 / CCS2適用。當接口類型寫入招標、車輛車隊、充電點運營商、場地方、捐助方或公用事業驗收要求時，即成為強制項目要求。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — Electric Vehicle and Plug in Hybrid Electric Vehicle Conductive Charge Coupler
CCS1 / SAE Combo 1 — DC fast charging connector used in North American deployments
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project-owner, fleet, donor, CPO, LERC, or LEC connector specification for Liberia

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. GB/T AC and DC couplers are physically and electrically incompatible with SAE J1772 Type 1 and CCS1 vehicle inlets. China DC fast charging also uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication, which is not the CCS1 communication stack. A China GB/T connector package therefore cannot be used as a plug-compatible Liberia package where J1772 or CCS1 is required.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流耦合器与SAE J1772 Type 1及CCS1车辆接口在物理和电气层面均不兼容。中国直流快充还采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，并非CCS1通信栈。因此，在要求J1772或CCS1的利比里亚项目中，中国GB/T接口资料包不能作为可直接插接兼容的方案。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流和直流耦合器與SAE J1772 Type 1及CCS1車輛接口在物理和電氣層面均不兼容。中國直流快充還採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，並非CCS1通訊棧。因此，在要求J1772或CCS1的賴比瑞亞項目中，中國GB/T接口資料包不能作為可直接插接兼容的方案。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A GB/T-only charger needs hardware and protocol redesign before deployment in a J1772 / CCS1 Liberia project: coupler, cable assembly, locking, proximity and control pilot behavior, contact ratings, labels, temperature-rise evidence, spare parts, DC communication stack, and vehicle compatibility testing must be changed and documented. Adapters should not be treated as a conformity solution. Exporters must confirm the actual Liberia vehicle fleet and site specification before quoting; if a donor or fleet specifies Type 2 / CCS2 instead, the product must follow that project requirement instead.
gap.zh: 仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩在用于利比里亚J1772 / CCS1项目前，需要进行硬件和协议重新设计：耦合器、电缆组件、锁止、接近导引和控制导引行为、触点额定值、标签、温升证据、备件、直流通信栈和车辆兼容性测试均须变更并形成文件。转接器不应被视为合格方案。出口商在报价前须确认利比里亚实际车辆车队和场址规范；如捐助方或车队改为指定Type 2 / CCS2，则产品须遵循该项目要求。
gap.zht: 僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁在用於賴比瑞亞J1772 / CCS1項目前，需要進行硬體和協議重新設計：耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止、接近導引和控制導引行為、觸點額定值、標籤、溫升證據、備件、直流通訊棧和車輛兼容性測試均須變更並形成文件。轉接器不應被視為合格方案。出口商在報價前須確認賴比瑞亞實際車輛車隊和場址規範；如捐助方或車隊改為指定Type 2 / CCS2，則產品須遵循該項目要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent — no public Liberia national EV connector mandate confirmed; J1772 / CCS1 is a plausible 60 Hz Americas-style baseline and becomes mandatory when specified by fleet, donor, CPO, site owner, LERC, or LEC requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a J1772 / CCS1 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not ship a GB/T-connector charger to Liberia on the assumption that paperwork can solve connector mismatch. Confirm the project connector first; for a J1772 / CCS1 Liberia deployment, GB/T connectors and GB/T 27930 communication require hardware, firmware, and compatibility redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应在假定文件可解决接口不匹配的情况下向利比里亚发送GB/T接口充电桩。应先确认项目接口；对于利比里亚J1772 / CCS1部署，GB/T接口和GB/T 27930通信需要硬件、固件和兼容性重新设计。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應在假定文件可解決接口不匹配的情況下向賴比瑞亞發送GB/T接口充電樁。應先確認項目接口；對於賴比瑞亞J1772 / CCS1部署，GB/T接口和GB/T 27930通訊需要硬體、韌體和兼容性重新設計。
